bird.name: Phoenix petrel
bird.summary: The Phoenix petrel (Pterodroma alba) is a medium-sized tropical seabird, measuring up to 35 cm (1.15 ft) long, with a wingspan of 83 cm (2.…

relations.subject: Phoenix petrel
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size, predation by invasive species and human exploitation, the Phoenix petrel is evaluated as vulnerable on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Phoenix petrel
relations.evidence: Due to ongoing habitat loss, small population size, predation by invasive species and human exploitation, the Phoenix petrel is evaluated as vulnerable on the IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
